steps.title: Identify what describes thrown-away devices
steps.content: The key phrase is "becoming harmful ____". We need a noun for what discarded devices become. The word "harmful" is decisive—it signals something negative or problematic.

steps.title: Match the answer to the signal
steps.content:
The noun needs to complete "becoming harmful ___," describing what discarded electronic devices turn into. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — advice: a recommendation or guidance — inherently positive and abstract; devices cannot become harmful advice. ✗
  • Choice B — waste: discarded material, especially material that harms the environment — fits exactly: devices thrown away become harmful e-waste. ✓
  • Choice C — rewards: benefits or prizes — a positive noun that contradicts the "harmful" signal. ✗
  • Choice D — positions: locations or roles — does not fit the environmental context of discarded electronic devices at all. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
